framework.name: EU AI Act
framework.disclaimer: Summaries of EU AI Act articles are independently written for educational reference. The official, legally binding text is published in the Official Journal of the European Union (Regulation (EU) 2024/1689). Do not rely on this tool for legal or compliance decisions.

controls.title: Risk Management System
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must establish, implement, and maintain a continuous risk management system across the lifecycle.

controls.title: Data and Data Governance
controls.statement: Training, validation, and testing data for high-risk AI must meet quality and governance criteria, including bias examination.

controls.title: Record-Keeping (Logging)
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must automatically record events (logs) over their lifetime to ensure traceability.

controls.title: Transparency and Information to Users
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must be transparent enough for deployers to interpret output and use the system appropriately.

controls.title: Human Oversight
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must be designed to allow effective human oversight that can prevent or minimize risks.

controls.title: Accuracy, Robustness and Cybersecurity
controls.statement: High-risk AI systems must achieve appropriate levels of accuracy, robustness, and cybersecurity, and perform consistently.
